---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the Sage compiler or runtime
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Minimal `.sg` file that reproduces the issue:

```sage
// Your code here
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- Sage version: `sage --version`
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Rust version (if building from source): `rustc --version`

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
